DB_HOST.description: PostgreSQL database host. Auto-injected from Railway Postgres companion.

DB_PORT.description: PostgreSQL database port. Auto-injected from Railway Postgres companion.

DB_NAME.description: Database name for Wiki.js data. Auto-injected from Railway Postgres companion.

DB_USER.description: Database user for Wiki.js. Auto-injected from Railway Postgres companion.

DB_PASS.description: Database password. Auto-injected from Railway Postgres companion.

URL_BASE.description: Public URL of your wiki. Required for proper asset serving.

DB_TYPE.description: Database engine: postgres, mysql, mssql, or sqlite (default: postgres).

DB_FILEPATH.description: Path for SQLite database file when using DB_TYPE=sqlite.
